title: Green Frog Plush Dog Toy with Squeaker – Soft, ribbed fabric for interactive play. A great choice for small and medium dogs' playtime with squeaky toys.
features: Cute Frog Design - This green frog plush toy features an adorable design that draws your dog’s attention, making playtime visually stimulating.

Made from corduroy, this toy combines durability with a gentle touch, keeping your dog’s teeth safe while promising hours of fun. And yes, it may eventually give way—but that only shows it’s a favourite for your good boy or good girl!
Elastic & Easy to Clean - The frog plush is designed with an elastic and smooth texture that is resistant to shedding.
Chewing, Fetching & Stress Relief – Pets will love to chew, fetch, and play with this toy, helping reduce stress and providing an engaging activity. Note: For aggressive chewers, this toy may break.
Squeaky & Interactive Play - The built-in BB whistle produces a cute squeaky sound when squeezed, encouraging interaction and providing extra excitement.
description: Product Description Does its squeak attract dogs' attention? Yes, from playing with our dogs, we found that it definitely gets their attention. We tested it on a Dachshund, Pug, Cockapoo and Lab. Are the Dog Toys Indestructible? We’re afraid not. While no dog toy is truly indestructible, these have gone through rigorous factory testing and have been approved by our own good boys and girls. The seams are also reinforced to withstand more playtime. Are its stuffing materials non-toxic for dogs? Yes, the stuffing materials are non-toxic and safe for dogs. We use Recycled Polyethylene Terephthalate (rPET), a pet-friendly, sustainable material, to ensure your furry friends can enjoy their toys safely. Do dogs prefer any toy over the others? Dogs see blue and yellow best, which is why we designed the Elephant in bright blue and Mr Frog in green/yellow. Who are Zappi Co? We’re a company founded by school friends based in Warwickshire, England. We started with plush toys and noticed many customers were giving them to their pets, which inspired us to launch a dedicated pet toy range. The Dog pictured is called Daisy
